Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grand Oath Array]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Grand Oath Array controls time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Emala's Grand Oath Array was based on runes derived from the ancient runes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Grand Oath Array's working was impossible to unravel for Sages and Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Emala used the Grand Oath Array to seal the castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — The Grand Oath Array contains pieces of Sage’s authority.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — The Grand Oath Array is an array that can be operated with a Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel activated the Grand Oath Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — The Grand Oath Array can accelerate time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel manifests silver runes to activate the Grand Oath Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel steers a Grand Oath Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — The Grand Oath Array can be used to slow suffering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel has a Grand Oath Array stowed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Grand Oath Array is a time-warping array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Grand Oath Array was burning its own structure to fuel itself due to Ziel's lack of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Grand Oath Array is the Rune Queen’s masterpiece.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Grand Oath Array is in bad shape.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
